text: ccglass is a lightweight local logging reverse-proxy with a web dashboard for inspecting API requests from coding agents.

evidence.quote: See exactly what your coding agent sends to the model. A lightweight

issues.detail: 1 argument(s) not found in the quote/span — advisory only

text: Coding agent CLIs ignore HTTP_PROXY/HTTPS_PROXY environment variables, making traditional intercepting proxies ineffective.

evidence.quote: These CLIs are Node/native apps that ignore HTTP_PROXY/HTTPS_PROXY

text: ccglass intercepts traffic by having the client make its HTTPS connection to the real API directly, while only the plain HTTP hop to localhost passes through the proxy — avoiding the need for CA certificates or TLS pinning.

evidence.quote: ccglass sidesteps all of it: the client does the HTTPS to the real API

evidence.quote: Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, DeepSeek-TUI, Kimi, Ollama, OpenRouter, and more.
